title: 1/10000 Chance for Pennywise Jumpscare Every Second
description: 1/10000 Chance for Pennywise Jumpscare Every Second. Use /setjumpscareodds [X] to set the jumpscare odds to 1/X (This mod is just a remake of a mod by BIsForBoosted)
body: 1/10000 Chance for Pennywise Jumpscare Every Second. Use /setjumpscareodds [X] to set the jumpscare odds to 1/X (**This mod is just a remake of a mod by BIsForBoosted**) THIS IS NOT A HOME-MADE MOD, BUT JUST A REMAKE
